login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.brandSubtitle: Reliable delivery, automatic retries, and complete visibility for every webhook.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Get started with your webhook infrastructure
register.passwordHint: Must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character (@$!%*?&-_#)
register.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
register.success: Account created! Please verify your email.
register.brandSubtitle: Create your account and send your first webhook event in under 5 minutes.
register.benefit1: Free to start — no credit card required
register.benefit3: Full API access from day one
register.verificationSent: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account.
register.resendHint: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or click resend above.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset link. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.tooMany: Too many requests. Please try again later.
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below. It must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid or missing the required token.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

verification.banner: Please verify your email {{email}} to unlock all features.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage your webhook projects and integrations
projects.noProjectsDesc: Get started by creating your first project to manage webhooks and integrations
projects.noProjectsViewer: No projects have been created yet. Ask a Developer or Owner to create one.

createDialog.title: Create New Project
createDialog.description: Add a new project to organize your webhooks and integrations
createDialog.name: Project Name

deleteDialog.title: Are you sure?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the project and all associated data.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your webhook platform activity
dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to start sending webhooks and monitoring deliveries.

recentEvents.title: Recent Events
recentEvents.subtitle: Latest webhook events
recentEvents.emptyDesc: Events will appear here when sent

endpointHealth.title: Endpoint Health
endpointHealth.subtitle: Top endpoints by volume
endpointHealth.emptyDesc: Add endpoints to start receiving webhooks

endpoints.title: Endpoints
endpoints.subtitle: Manage webhook endpoints for {{project}}
endpoints.noEndpointsDesc: Create your first endpoint to start receiving webhook deliveries
endpoints.verificationHint: Respond to POST with the challenge value.

createDialog.title: Create New Endpoint
createDialog.description: Add a new webhook endpoint to receive events
createDialog.urlHint: The URL where webhook events will be sent
createDialog.rateLimitHint: Maximum requests per second (leave empty for no limit)
createDialog.allowedIpsHint: For documentation only. Record which IPs your endpoint expects webhooks from.

deleteDialog.title: Delete endpoint?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This endpoint will stop receiving webhooks immediately.

toggleDialog.enableDesc: This endpoint will start receiving webhooks again.
toggleDialog.disableDesc: This endpoint will stop receiving webhooks until re-enabled.

rotateDialog.title: Rotate webhook secret?
rotateDialog.description: A new secret will be generated. You'll need to update your webhook signature verification with the new secret. The old secret will stop working immediately.

secretDialog.title: New Webhook Secret
secretDialog.description: Save this secret securely. It won't be shown again.
secretDialog.hint: Use this secret to verify webhook signatures in your application.

testDialog.title: Endpoint Test Result
testDialog.description: Test webhook was sent to the endpoint

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Route event types to endpoints for {{project}}
subscriptions.noSubscriptionsDesc: Create a subscription to route events to your endpoints

deleteDialog.title: Delete Subscription?
deleteDialog.description: This subscription will be permanently deleted. Events of this type will no longer be delivered to the endpoint.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Webhook events for {{project}}
events.noEventsDesc: Send your first webhook event to start processing deliveries

deliveries.title: Deliveries
deliveries.subtitle: Track webhook delivery attempts for {{project}}
deliveries.noDeliveriesDesc: Deliveries will appear here once events are sent to your endpoints
deliveries.replayError: Please select a status filter (FAILED or DLQ) before bulk replay

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage API keys for {{project}}
apiKeys.noKeysDesc: Create your first API key to start sending events
apiKeys.noKeysDescViewer: No API keys have been created yet. Ask a Developer or Owner to create one.
apiKeys.name: Name

createDialog.title: Create New API Key
createDialog.description: Add a new API key to send events to this project
createDialog.name: Key Name
createDialog.nameHint: A descriptive name to identify this API key

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key?
revokeDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This API key will stop working immediately and all requests using it will be rejected.

keyDialog.title: API Key Created Successfully
keyDialog.description: Save this API key securely. It won't be shown again.
keyDialog.label: API Key
keyDialog.hint: Use this key in the X-API-Key header when sending events

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage access to this organization
members.noMembersDesc: You are the only member of this organization

removeDialog.title: Remove Member?
removeDialog.description: This member will lose access to the organization and all its resources. This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and organization settings
settings.newPasswordHint: Min 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: Track who did what in your organization
auditLog.noLogsDesc: Actions like creating endpoints, rotating secrets will appear here

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Real-time webhook delivery metrics
analytics.noDataDesc: Start sending webhook events to see analytics
analytics.noDeliveryDataDesc: Send events to see the chart

dlq.title: Dead Letter Queue
dlq.subtitle: Failed deliveries for {{project}}
dlq.noItemsDesc: All deliveries are being processed successfully

purgeDialog.title: Purge All DLQ Items?
purgeDialog.description: This will permanently delete all {{count}} items from the Dead Letter Queue. This action cannot be undone.

testEndpoints.title: Test Endpoints
testEndpoints.subtitle: Temporary endpoints to capture and inspect webhook requests
testEndpoints.selectEndpoint: Select an endpoint to view requests

deleteDialog.title: Delete test endpoint?
deleteDialog.description: This will delete the endpoint and all captured requests.
